verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
verse.verse_2: And when the stars fall, dispersing,
verse.verse_3: And when the mountains are removed
verse.verse_4: And when full-term she-camels are neglected
verse.verse_5: And when the wild beasts are gathered
verse.verse_6: And when the seas are filled with flame
verse.verse_7: And when the souls are paired
verse.verse_8: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked
verse.verse_9: For what sin she was killed
verse.verse_10: And when the pages are made public
verse.verse_11: And when the sky is stripped away
verse.verse_12: And when Hellfire is set ablaze
verse.verse_13: And when Paradise is brought near,
verse.verse_14: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
verse.verse_15: So I swear by the retreating stars -
verse.verse_16: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
verse.verse_17: And by the night as it closes in
verse.verse_18: And by the dawn when it breathes
verse.verse_19: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
verse.verse_20: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
verse.verse_21: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
verse.verse_22: And your companion is not [at all] mad.
verse.verse_23: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
verse.verse_24: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.
verse.verse_25: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
verse.verse_27: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
verse.verse_28: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.
verse.verse_29: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
